verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yes, there are times I want to stop serving my Lord Forgetting all what Jesus said from day to day My mind has told me, what do I get in serving God And I’ll be weary and I’ll be sorry throughout the years

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And then I cried, and cried, and cried, thinking of Blessings I received, The joy and peace He gave to me, from day to day With all my heart I closed my eyes and then I feel the touch of God Is really real And Jesus said in simple words, ‘Dear, stay with me. ’

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now, I received and feel the joy and victory For Jesus said, ‘I’ll be with you from day to day’, Now I am singing, my heart is dreaming in serving God And He is risen, and He has liveth deep in my heart.
